THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUCKINGHAM, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 805 LEAVENWORTH 	09, STAYED UNTIL NOV-25-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES.
